member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Exceptions.AsyncQueryNotFoundException
member.summary: Thrown when an asynchronous query result is no longer available.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Exceptions.DocumentException
member.summary: Base exception thrown by repository operations when an Elasticsearch request fails.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Exceptions.DocumentNotFoundException
member.summary: Thrown when a requested document does not exist in the repository.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Exceptions.DocumentValidationException
member.summary: Thrown when a document fails validation before being persisted.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Exceptions.DuplicateDocumentException
member.summary: Thrown when an add operation encounters a document with a duplicate ID (HTTP 409 on create).

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Exceptions.QueryValidationException
member.summary: Thrown when a repository query contains an invalid field condition that would produce incorrect or empty results at query execution time.

list.item: Using FieldEquals/FieldNotEquals on an analyzed text field that has no .keyword sub-field (TermQuery on analyzed fields almost never matches).
Using FieldContains/FieldNotContains on a non-analyzed (keyword) field.
Targeting the IsDeleted field on a soft-delete entity with ActiveOnly mode, which creates a contradictory filter.
Passing a collection value to a range operator (ranges require scalar values).
Passing a null value to a range operator (null range bounds are meaningless).

remarks.para: Check the and properties to identify the offending condition, and read the exception message for the specific fix.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Exceptions.QueryValidationException.Field
member.summary: The resolved Elasticsearch field name that caused the validation failure.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Exceptions.QueryValidationException.Operator
member.summary: The comparison operator that was used (e.g., "Equals", "Contains", "GreaterThan"), if applicable.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Exceptions.RepositoryException
member.summary: Base exception for repository configuration and operational errors.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Exceptions.VersionConflictDocumentException
member.summary: Thrown when a save or patch operation fails due to an optimistic concurrency version conflict (HTTP 409).

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.AfterQueryEventArgs`1
member.summary: Event arguments for the event, raised after a query is executed to allow transformation of query results including aggregations.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.IAggregate
member.summary: Represents an aggregation result from a search query.
member.remarks: Aggregations provide summarized data about the documents matching a query, such as counts, averages, date histograms, and term frequencies.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.IAggregate.Data
member.summary: Gets or sets the aggregation data.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.IBucket
member.summary: Represents a bucket in a bucket aggregation result.
member.remarks: Buckets group documents based on field values, ranges, or other criteria. Each bucket contains a subset of documents and can include nested aggregations.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.IBucket.Data
member.summary: Gets or sets the bucket data, including document count and nested aggregations.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.EntityChanged.Type
member.summary: The entity type name. May be null for non-entity-specific change notifications.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.EntityChanged.Id
member.summary: The entity identifier. Null for bulk or collection-level change notifications that do not target a single document.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.FindResults`1
member.summary: Contains the results of a find operation, including documents, pagination, and aggregations.

member.name: F:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.FindResults`1.Empty
member.summary: An empty result set.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.FindResults`1.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new empty instance of the class.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The search hits.
The total number of matching documents.
The aggregation results.
A function to retrieve the next page of results.
Additional metadata.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.FindResults`1.Documents
member.summary: Gets the documents from the search hits (convenience property).

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.FindResults`1.Hits
member.summary: Gets the search hits, which include documents along with metadata like score and version.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.FindResults`1.Page
member.summary: Gets the current page number (1-based).

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.FindResults`1.HasMore
member.summary: Gets whether there are more pages of results available.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.FindResults`1.NextPageAsync
member.summary: Advances to the next page of results.
member.returns: true if there was a next page; false if there are no more results.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.IFindResults`1
member.summary: Provides pagination support for find results.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.IFindResults`1.Page
member.summary: Gets or sets the current page number (1-based).

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.IFindResults`1.HasMore
member.summary: Gets or sets whether there are more pages of results available.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.IFindResults`1.GetNextPageFunc
member.summary: Gets or sets the function used to retrieve the next page of results.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.IFindResults`1.Reverse
member.summary: Reverses the order of the results.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.CountResult
member.summary: Contains the result of a count operation, including the total count and optional aggregations.

member.name: F:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.CountResult.Empty
member.summary: An empty count result.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.CountResult.#ctor(System.Int64,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,Foundatio.Repositories.Models.IAggregate},System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The total document count.
The aggregation results.
Additional metadata.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.CountResult.Total
member.summary: Gets the total number of documents matching the query.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.CountResult.Aggregations
member.summary: Gets the aggregation results.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.CountResult.Data
member.summary: Gets additional metadata associated with the result.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.CountResult.Aggs
member.summary: Gets a helper for accessing typed aggregation results.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.CountResult.op_Implicit(Foundatio.Repositories.Models.CountResult)~System.Int64
member.summary: Implicitly converts a to a .

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.CountResult.op_Implicit(Foundatio.Repositories.Models.CountResult)~System.Int32
member.summary: Implicitly converts a to an .

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.FindHit`1
member.summary: Represents a single search hit, containing the document and associated metadata.

member.name: F:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.FindHit`1.Empty
member.summary: An empty search hit.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.FindHit`1.#ctor(System.String,`0,System.Double,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The document identifier.
The document.
The relevance score.
The document version.
The routing value.
Additional metadata.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.FindHit`1.Document
member.summary: Gets the document.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.FindHit`1.Score
member.summary: Gets the relevance score for this hit.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.FindHit`1.Version
member.summary: Gets the document version.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.FindHit`1.Id
member.summary: Gets the document identifier.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.FindHit`1.Routing
member.summary: Gets the routing value used for this document.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.FindHit`1.Data
member.summary: Gets additional metadata associated with this hit.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.IHaveDates
member.summary: Indicates that a document tracks both creation and last update timestamps.
member.remarks: Repository implementations automatically set when a document is first added and update on each save operation.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.IHaveDates.UpdatedUtc
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when this document was last updated.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.IHaveCreatedDate
member.summary: Indicates that a document tracks its creation timestamp.
member.remarks: Repository implementations automatically set when a document is first added.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.IHaveCreatedDate.CreatedUtc
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when this document was created.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.IIdentity.Id
member.summary: Unique id that identifies a document.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.IPatchOperation
member.summary: Marker interface for patch operations that can be applied to documents.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.PartialPatch
member.summary: A patch operation that updates a document using a partial document object.
member.remarks:
Only the non-null properties of the partial document will be applied to the target document. Elasticsearch's detect_noop (enabled by default) automatically returns a no-op when the partial document does not change any field values. However, automatic date tracking injects UpdatedUtc, which typically prevents noop detection for models.
Cache invalidation: Uses ID-based invalidation only. The Update API executes server-side and does not return the modified document to the client.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.PartialPatch.#ctor(System.Object)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: An object containing the properties to update.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.PartialPatch.Document
member.summary: Gets the partial document containing properties to update.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.ActionPatch`1
member.summary: A patch operation that applies one or more actions to modify a document.
member.remarks:
Actions that return bool signal whether the document was modified. When all actions return false, the write to Elasticsearch is skipped entirely (no Index call, no date tracking, no cache invalidation). Actions that use are assumed to always modify the document.
Cache invalidation: Uses document-based invalidation. The modified is passed to InvalidateCacheAsync, so custom cache key overrides work correctly.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.ActionPatch`1.#ctor(System.Action{`0})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a single action that always signals modification.
member.param: The action to apply to the document.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.ActionPatch`1.#ctor(System.Func{`0,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a single action that returns whether the document was modified.
member.param: A function that modifies the document and returns true if modified, false for no-op.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.ActionPatch`1.#ctor(System.Action{`0}[])
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with multiple actions that always signal modification.
member.param: The actions to apply to the document.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.ActionPatch`1.Actions
member.summary: Gets the collection of actions to apply to the document. Each returns true if the document was modified.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.JsonPatch
member.summary: A patch operation that applies a JSON Patch document (RFC 6902) to a document.
member.remarks:
Uses a get-modify-reindex pattern, so a write always occurs and PatchAsync always returns true. Empty patch documents (no operations) return false.
Cache invalidation: Bulk operations (PatchAllAsync) use document-based invalidation. Single-document PatchAsync uses ID-based invalidation because it operates on raw JSON rather than a typed document.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.JsonPatch.#ctor(Foundatio.Repositories.Utility.PatchDocument)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The JSON Patch document to apply.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.JsonPatch.Patch
member.summary: Gets the JSON Patch document to apply.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.ScriptPatch
member.summary: A patch operation that executes a script to modify a document (Elasticsearch-specific).
member.remarks:
Elasticsearch does not automatically detect noops for script updates. To signal a no-op, the script must explicitly set ctx.op = 'none'. Painless uses == for equality (Java-style); === is not valid.
Cache invalidation: Uses ID-based invalidation only. Scripts execute server-side and do not return the modified document to the client.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.ScriptPatch.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The script to execute.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.ScriptPatch.Script
member.summary: Gets the script to execute.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.ScriptPatch.Params
member.summary: Gets or sets the parameters to pass to the script.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.ActionPatchExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for applying operations.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.ISupportSoftDeletes
member.summary: Indicates that a document supports soft delete functionality.

remarks.para: When a document type implements this interface, repository read operations automatically filter out documents where is true. Use options.IncludeSoftDeletes() to include soft-deleted documents in query results.
To soft delete a document, set to true and save it. The repository will publish a notification when IsDeleted changes from false to true.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.ISupportSoftDeletes.IsDeleted
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this document has been soft deleted.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.IVersioned.Version
member.summary: Current modification version for the document.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.ILazyDocument
member.summary: Represents a document that can be deserialized on demand.
member.remarks: Lazy documents defer deserialization until the data is actually needed, which can improve performance when processing large result sets where not all documents need to be fully materialized.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.ILazyDocument.As``1
member.summary: Deserializes the document to the specified type.
member.returns: The deserialized document, or null if the document data is empty.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.ILazyDocument.As(System.Type)
member.summary: Deserializes the document to the specified type.
member.param: The type to deserialize to.
member.returns: The deserialized document, or null if the document data is empty.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.LazyDocument
member.summary: Default implementation of that deserializes from raw byte data.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Models.LazyDocument.#ctor(System.Byte[],Foundatio.Serializer.ITextSerializer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The raw document data.
The serializer to use for deserialization. Defaults to JSON.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Extensions.EnumerableExtensions.UnionOriginalAndModified``1(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{Foundatio.Repositories.Models.ModifiedDocument{``0}})
member.summary: Combines both the modified (current) and original (previous) values from a collection of modified documents. Useful for cache invalidation when you need keys from both the old and new state of changed documents.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Extensions.EnumerableExtensions.ToHex(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Byte})
member.summary: Converts a byte array to Hexadecimal.
member.param: The bytes to convert.
member.returns: Hexadecimal string of the byte array.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Extensions.FindResultsExtensions.IsAsyncQueryPartial(Foundatio.Utility.IHaveData)
member.summary: Whether the query completed successfully or was interrupted (will also be true while the query is still running)

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.Extensions.FindResultsExtensions.IsAsyncQueryRunning(Foundatio.Utility.IHaveData)
member.summary: Whether the query is still running

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.IReadOnlyRepository`1
member.summary: Provides read-only data access operations for documents of type .
member.remarks: When implements , read operations automatically filter out documents where is true. Use options.IncludeSoftDeletes() to include soft-deleted documents in results.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.IReadOnlyRepository`1.GetByIdAsync(Foundatio.Repositories.Id,Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Retrieves a document by its unique identifier.
member.param: The document identifier.
Options to control caching, soft delete filtering, and other behaviors.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.IReadOnlyRepository`1.GetByIdsAsync(Foundatio.Repositories.Ids,Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Retrieves multiple documents by their unique identifiers.
member.param: The document identifiers.
Options to control caching, soft delete filtering, and other behaviors.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.IReadOnlyRepository`1.GetAllAsync(Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Retrieves all documents in the repository.
member.param: Options to control paging, caching, soft delete filtering, and other behaviors.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.IReadOnlyRepository`1.ExistsAsync(Foundatio.Repositories.Id,Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Checks whether a document with the specified identifier exists.
member.param: The document identifier.
Options to control caching, soft delete filtering, and other behaviors.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.IReadOnlyRepository`1.CountAsync(Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Gets the total count of documents in the repository.
member.param: Options to control caching, soft delete filtering, and other behaviors.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.IReadOnlyRepository`1.InvalidateCacheAsync(`0)
member.summary: Invalidates cached data for the specified document.
member.param: The document whose cache entries should be invalidated.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.IReadOnlyRepository`1.InvalidateCacheAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Invalidates cached data for the specified documents.
member.param: The documents whose cache entries should be invalidated.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.IReadOnlyRepository`1.InvalidateCacheAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Invalidates a specific cache entry by key.
member.param: The cache key to invalidate.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.IReadOnlyRepository`1.InvalidateCacheAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Invalidates multiple cache entries by key.
member.param: The cache keys to invalidate.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.IReadOnlyRepository`1.BeforeQuery
member.summary: Event raised before a query is executed, allowing modification of query parameters.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.IReadOnlyRepository`1.AfterQuery
member.summary: Event raised after a query is executed, allowing transformation of query results including aggregations.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.IRepository`1
member.summary: Provides full CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations for documents of type .
member.typeparam: The document type, which must implement .

remarks.para: performs a hard delete, permanently removing the document. To soft delete a document, set to true and call . When a document's IsDeleted changes from false to true, the repository publishes a change notification.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.IRepository`1.AddAsync(`0,Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Adds a new document to the repository.
member.param: The document to add.
Options to control caching, notifications, and other behaviors.
member.returns: The added document with any generated fields populated (e.g., Id).
member.exception: Thrown when a document with the same ID already exists.
Thrown when the Elasticsearch request fails.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.IRepository`1.AddAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Adds multiple documents to the repository.
member.param: The documents to add.
Options to control caching, notifications, and other behaviors.
member.exception: Thrown when any document ID already exists. Successfully added documents are still cached and notified.
Thrown when the Elasticsearch request fails.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.IRepository`1.SaveAsync(`0,Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Saves changes to an existing document, or adds it if it doesn't exist.
member.param: The document to save.
Options to control caching, notifications, and other behaviors.
member.exception: Thrown when the document version conflicts with the stored version (optimistic concurrency).
Thrown when the Elasticsearch request fails.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.IRepository`1.SaveAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Saves changes to multiple existing documents.
member.param: The documents to save.
Options to control caching, notifications, and other behaviors.
member.exception: Thrown when any document has a version conflict. Successfully saved documents are still cached and notified.
Thrown when the Elasticsearch request fails.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.IRepository`1.PatchAsync(Foundatio.Repositories.Id,Foundatio.Repositories.Models.IPatchOperation,Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Applies a patch operation to a document.
member.param: The identifier of the document to patch.
The patch operation to apply (e.g., , , ).
Options to control caching, notifications, and other behaviors.
member.returns:
true if the document was modified; false if the operation was a no-op.
: Elasticsearch's automatic detect_noop determines the result. Note that automatic date tracking injects UpdatedUtc, which typically prevents noop detection.
: Only a no-op when the script explicitly sets ctx.op = 'none'.
: Returns false when all return false, or when there are no actions. The Action{T} overload always assumes modification.
: Always returns true (uses get-modify-reindex). Empty operations return false.
member.exception: Thrown when the document does not exist.
Thrown when the document version conflicts (HTTP 409).
Thrown when the Elasticsearch request fails.

remarks.para: Cache invalidation: uses document-based cache invalidation (the modified is passed to InvalidateCacheAsync), so custom cache key overrides work correctly. All other patch types use ID-based invalidation only.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.IRepository`1.PatchAsync(Foundatio.Repositories.Ids,Foundatio.Repositories.Models.IPatchOperation,Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Applies a patch operation to multiple documents.
member.param: The identifiers of the documents to patch.
The patch operation to apply.
Options to control caching, notifications, and other behaviors.
member.returns: The number of documents actually modified (excludes no-ops).

remarks.para: Cache invalidation: and bulk use document-based cache invalidation. and use ID-based invalidation only (the modified document is not available client-side).

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.IRepository`1.RemoveAsync(Foundatio.Repositories.Id,Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Permanently removes a document from the repository (hard delete).
member.param: The identifier of the document to remove.
Options to control caching, notifications, and other behaviors.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.IRepository`1.RemoveAsync(Foundatio.Repositories.Ids,Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Permanently removes multiple documents from the repository (hard delete).
member.param: The identifiers of the documents to remove.
Options to control caching, notifications, and other behaviors.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.IRepository`1.RemoveAsync(`0,Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Permanently removes a document from the repository (hard delete).
member.param: The document to remove.
Options to control caching, notifications, and other behaviors.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.IRepository`1.RemoveAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Permanently removes multiple documents from the repository (hard delete).
member.param: The documents to remove.
Options to control caching, notifications, and other behaviors.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.IRepository`1.RemoveAllAsync(Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Permanently removes all documents from the repository (hard delete).
member.param: Options to control caching, notifications, and other behaviors.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.IRepository`1.DocumentsAdding
member.summary: Event raised before documents are added to the repository.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.IRepository`1.DocumentsAdded
member.summary: Event raised after documents have been added to the repository.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.IRepository`1.DocumentsSaving
member.summary: Event raised before documents are saved to the repository.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.IRepository`1.DocumentsSaved
member.summary: Event raised after documents have been saved to the repository.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.IRepository`1.DocumentsRemoving
member.summary: Event raised before documents are removed from the repository.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.IRepository`1.DocumentsRemoved
member.summary: Event raised after documents have been removed from the repository.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.IRepository`1.DocumentsChanging
member.summary: Event raised before any document change (add, save, or remove) is persisted.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.IRepository`1.DocumentsChanged
member.summary: Event raised after any document change (add, save, or remove) has been persisted.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.ISearchableReadOnlyRepository`1
member.summary: Extends with query-based search capabilities.
member.remarks: When implements , queries automatically filter out documents where is true. Use options.IncludeSoftDeletes() to include soft-deleted documents in results.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.ISearchableReadOnlyRepository`1.RemoveQueryAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Removes the cached results of an async query.
member.param: The identifier of the query to remove.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.ISearchableReadOnlyRepository`1.FindAsync(Foundatio.Repositories.RepositoryQueryDescriptor{`0},Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Finds documents matching the specified query.
member.param: An object containing filter criteria used to enforce tenancy or other system-level filters.
Options to control paging, caching, soft delete filtering, and other behaviors.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.ISearchableReadOnlyRepository`1.FindAsAsync``1(Foundatio.Repositories.RepositoryQueryDescriptor{`0},Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Finds documents matching the specified query and maps results to a different type.
member.typeparam: The type to map results to.
member.param: An object containing filter criteria used to enforce tenancy or other system-level filters.
Options to control paging, caching, soft delete filtering, and other behaviors.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.ISearchableReadOnlyRepository`1.FindOneAsync(Foundatio.Repositories.RepositoryQueryDescriptor{`0},Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Finds a single document matching the specified query.
member.param: An object containing filter criteria used to enforce tenancy or other system-level filters.
Options to control caching, soft delete filtering, and other behaviors.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.ISearchableReadOnlyRepository`1.CountAsync(Foundatio.Repositories.RepositoryQueryDescriptor{`0},Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Gets a document count and optional aggregation data for documents matching the query.
member.param: An object containing filter criteria used to enforce tenancy or other system-level filters.
Options to control caching, soft delete filtering, and other behaviors.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.ISearchableReadOnlyRepository`1.ExistsAsync(Foundatio.Repositories.RepositoryQueryDescriptor{`0},Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Checks whether any document exists that matches the specified query.
member.param: An object containing filter criteria used to enforce tenancy or other system-level filters.
Options to control caching, soft delete filtering, and other behaviors.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.ISearchableRepository`1
member.summary: Extends and with query-based mutation operations.
member.typeparam: The document type, which must implement .

remarks.para: performs hard deletes, permanently removing documents. To soft delete documents, use to set to true.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.ISearchableRepository`1.PatchAllAsync(Foundatio.Repositories.RepositoryQueryDescriptor{`0},Foundatio.Repositories.Models.IPatchOperation,Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Applies a patch operation to all documents matching the query.
member.param: An object containing filter criteria used to enforce tenancy or other system-level filters.
The patch operation to apply (e.g., , , ).
Options to control caching, notifications, and other behaviors.

remarks.para: Cache invalidation: and use document-based cache invalidation per batch. and use ID-based invalidation only (the modified document is not available client-side).

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.ISearchableRepository`1.RemoveAllAsync(Foundatio.Repositories.RepositoryQueryDescriptor{`0},Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Permanently removes all documents matching the query (hard delete).
member.param: An object containing filter criteria used to enforce tenancy or other system-level filters.
Options to control caching, notifications, and other behaviors.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.ISearchableRepository`1.BatchProcessAsync(Foundatio.Repositories.RepositoryQueryDescriptor{`0},System.Func{Foundatio.Repositories.Models.FindResults{`0},System.Threading.Tasks.Task{System.Boolean}},Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Processes all documents matching the query in batches.
member.param: An object containing filter criteria used to enforce tenancy or other system-level filters.
A function that processes each batch and returns true to continue or false to stop.
Options to control paging, caching, and other behaviors.
member.returns: The total number of documents processed.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Repositories.ISearchableRepository`1.BatchProcessAsAsync``1(Foundatio.Repositories.RepositoryQueryDescriptor{`0},System.Func{Foundatio.Repositories.Models.FindResults{``0},System.Threading.Tasks.Task{System.Boolean}},Foundatio.Repositories.CommandOptionsDescriptor{`0})
member.summary: Processes all documents matching the query in batches, mapping results to a different type.
member.typeparam: The type to map results to.
member.param: An object containing filter criteria used to enforce tenancy or other system-level filters.
A function that processes each batch and returns true to continue or false to stop.
Options to control paging, caching, and other behaviors.
member.returns: The total number of documents processed.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Migrations.IMigration.MigrationType
member.summary: The type of migration. Versioned migrations are run once and they are run sequentially. VersionedAndResumable migrations are the same as Versioned migrations except if they fail to complete, they will automatically be retried. Repeatable migrations will be run after all versioned migrations are run and can be repeatedly run without causing issues. Version is not required on Repeatable migrations, if the Version property is populated, it is treated as a revision for that specific migration and if it has a revision that is higher than from when it was last run, then the migration will be run again.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Migrations.IMigration.Version
member.summary: Versioned and VersionedAndResumable migrations require a version number in order to be run. The version of the migration determines the order in which migrations are run. If a version is not set, they will be treated as disabled and will not run automatically. For Repeatable migrations, if the version is populated then it is considered a revision of that specific migration (not an overall version) and if the revision is higher than the last time the migration was run then the migration will be run again.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Repositories.Migrations.IMigration.RequiresOffline
member.summary: If set to true, indicates that this migration needs to be run while the application is offline.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.ICommandOptions
member.summary: Options that control the behavior of the repositories

member.name: T:Foundatio.Repositories.IRepositoryQuery
member.summary: Query options that control the result of the repository query operations
